qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following "C" program. void f(int, short); void main() { int i = 100; short s = 12; short *p = &s; ____________; // call to f() } Which one of the following expressions , when placed in the blank above, will NOT result in a type checking error?

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: The following function computes the maximum value contained in an integer array of size . int max (int *p,int n) { int a = 0, b=n-1; while (__________) { if (p[a]<= p[b]) {a = a+1;} else {b = b-1;} } return p[a];
